texts.label: text
texts.orig: Pinewood Beach Resort & Spa is a multi award-winning boutique hotel, where natural beauty and inspired design are merged to create the perfect romantic destination. Situated on the Diani - Galu strip, this intimate and stylish beach resort - on the wonderfully warm Indian Ocean - prides itself on exceptional personal service and attention.
texts.text: Pinewood Beach Resort & Spa is a multi award-winning boutique hotel, where natural beauty and inspired design are merged to create the perfect romantic destination. Situated on the Diani - Galu strip, this intimate and stylish beach resort - on the wonderfully warm Indian Ocean - prides itself on exceptional personal service and attention.

texts.label: page_footer
texts.orig: Pinewood Beach Resort & Spa P.O. Box 90521, Mombasa, Kenya
texts.text: Pinewood Beach Resort & Spa P.O. Box 90521, Mombasa, Kenya

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Savour fine food prepared using fresh local ingredients from our very own vegetable garden or straight from the bountiful ocean. Indulge your appetite during our daily changing evening theme dinners.
texts.text: Savour fine food prepared using fresh local ingredients from our very own vegetable garden or straight from the bountiful ocean. Indulge your appetite during our daily changing evening theme dinners.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Classy colourful cocktails in the cool ocean breeze ... Pinewood's peace and serenity let your mind escape whilst in a true paradise. Once in a lifetime memories, happen at Pinewood Beach ... every time.
texts.text: Classy colourful cocktails in the cool ocean breeze ... Pinewood's peace and serenity let your mind escape whilst in a true paradise. Once in a lifetime memories, happen at Pinewood Beach ... every time.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: At BAHARI Restaurant. Buffet and Live Cooking stations. And  NEW -now serving freshly ground Coffee consisting of Cappuccino, Espresso, Americano, Macchiato and Caffeelatte
texts.text: At BAHARI Restaurant. Buffet and Live Cooking stations. And  NEW -now serving freshly ground Coffee consisting of Cappuccino, Espresso, Americano, Macchiato and Caffeelatte

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A la carte served at TAMU GRILL (Poolside) or at JAHAZI BISTRO on the beach
texts.text: A la carte served at TAMU GRILL (Poolside) or at JAHAZI BISTRO on the beach

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Monday  - Continental ROAST at Bahari Restaurant
texts.text: Monday  - Continental ROAST at Bahari Restaurant

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Thursday  -  SWAHILI cuisine at Bahari Restaurant
texts.text: Thursday  -  SWAHILI cuisine at Bahari Restaurant

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Friday  -  Beach BBQ at Peponi Restaurant
texts.text: Friday  -  Beach BBQ at Peponi Restaurant

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Sunday  -  INDIAN cuisine at Bahari Restaurant
texts.text: Sunday  -  INDIAN cuisine at Bahari Restaurant

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Includes Breakfast and Dinner. And afternoon tea at the Pool
texts.text: Includes Breakfast and Dinner. And afternoon tea at the Pool

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Includes Full Board and soft drinks, fruit juices, house cocktails, house water, local beers, house wines & spirits
texts.text: Includes Full Board and soft drinks, fruit juices, house cocktails, house water, local beers, house wines & spirits

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Breakfast and 3 x dinner per week
texts.text: Breakfast and 3 x dinner per week

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Spectacular venue for Beach Dinners 2 x week
texts.text: Spectacular venue for Beach Dinners 2 x week

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Open all day and evenings during dinner
texts.text: Open all day and evenings during dinner

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Swimming Pool with swim-up Pool bar Bahari Lounge with TV & Library Peponi Beach Lounge Jahazi Beach Lounge -including coffee & Ice-Cream Zawadi Gift Boutique
texts.text: Swimming Pool with swim-up Pool bar Bahari Lounge with TV & Library Peponi Beach Lounge Jahazi Beach Lounge -including coffee & Ice-Cream Zawadi Gift Boutique

table_cells.text: ACCOMMODATION
We have 40 CATEGORY
rooms. 20 suites created in clusters around the ROOMFEATURES
gardens. ROOMFACILTIES
Deluxe GARDEN Rooms 24 Rooms 45 Square Meters Located on the first floor Capacity: 2Adts + 1Chd or 3Adts

➢ Spacious and newly renovated with garden view ➢ Furnished balcony with balcony bed, chairs & coffee table ➢ King sized & Twin bed ➢ En-suite bathroom with wall hung toilet & large shower cubicle ➢ Mosquito net, ceiling fan and split unit air conditioner
➢ Tea/Coffee service ➢ Mini Bar ➢ WiFi/Telephone ➢ Hair Dryer ➢ Safe
Premium GARDEN Rooms - New!! 12 Rooms 45 Square Meters Located on the first floor Capacity: 2Adts + 1Chd or 3Adts

➢ Spacious with superior finishings, Superior garden, closer to the pool & the beach ➢ Mosquito net, ceiling fan, split unit air conditioner ➢ Furnished balcony with balcony bed, chairs & coffee table ➢ En-suite bathroom with wall hung toilet & large shower cubicle ➢ King sized & Twin bed
➢ Tea/Coffee service ➢ Mini Bar / Safe ➢ WiFi/Telephone ➢ Hair Dryer ➢ Bathrobes / Slippers
Deluxe GARDEN Suites 12 Suites 90 Square Meters Located on the ground floor Capacity: 2Adts + 2 Chd or 3Adts

➢ Tea/Coffee service ➢ Mini Bar / Safe ➢ WiFi/Telephone ➢ Hair Dryer ➢ Bathrobes / Slippers

➢ Sea Font with spectacular view and Superior finish ➢ Furnished balcony with balcony bed, chairs & coffee table ➢ King sized & Twin bed ➢ Double Shower ➢ Mosquito net, ceiling fan and split unit air conditioner
➢ Tea/Coffee service ➢ Mini Bar / Safe ➢ WiFi/Telephone ➢ Hair Dryer ➢ Bathrobes / Slippers
Grand OCEAN FRONT Suites 2 Suites 90 Square Meters Located on the ground floor Capacity: 2Adts

from the airport
